title: Organizational Network Analysis Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Organizational Network Analysis skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

network_survey_responses.description: Network survey responses: structured questions asking each respondent who they go to for (a) advice or expertise, (b) information or project updates, and (c) energy or motivation when facing challenges

complete_roster_target.description: Complete roster of the target population so that non-respondents can be identified and follow-up conducted to maximize coverage

organizational_segmentation_data.description: Organizational segmentation data: function, team, level, location, and tenure for each node in the network

minimum_response_rate.description: Minimum response rate of 70% to produce a sufficiently complete network map for reliable centrality calculations

communication_metadata_collaboration.description: Communication metadata from collaboration platforms (email volume, Slack message patterns, meeting attendance) to triangulate with survey-based network data

prior_ona_results.description: Prior ONA results for the same population to track network changes over time following an intervention

formal_organizational_chart.description: Formal organizational chart for comparison between the official reporting structure and the informal network map
